name: Pepper Steak for Two - Sl 11/81
recipeIngredient: 1 large Tomato; peeled and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze the steak and slice across the grain into 2-inch by 1/4-inch strips.
2. Cook the steak in oil in a large skillet until brown.
3. Stir in tomato, green pepper, soy sauce, sugar, garlic salt, pepper, and ginger; cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Combine cornstarch and consomme; stir into the steak mixture. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve over rice.
Yield: 2 servings.
